# LLO Invites — ACE-Test-002

> **Fake contacts.** Do not send real emails. Always run this fixture with `--dry-run`.

## Invite list

| LLO | Contact | Email | District(s) | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| TestLand Health Partners (fictional) | Neal | neal@test.example.com | Luvale, Kaonde | Sole LLO for this fixture; gender-matched facilitator pool (2 women, 2 men) |

## Rationale

This is a single-LLO fixture by design — focus-group sessions in this fixture are all run by one LLO across two districts. A real focus-group opportunity might involve multiple LLOs; this fixture keeps the invite logic simple while still exercising the focus-group archetype path through `llo-invite`, `llo-onboarding`, and `llo-launch`.
